GSABaselineContractClauses.indemnificationScope: The contractor shall indemnify and hold harmless the government from all claims.
GSABaselineContractClauses.IPOwnershipTerms: All intellectual property created under this contract shall be owned by the government.
GSABaselineContractClauses.confidentialityObligations: The contractor must protect all confidential information and not disclose it without permission.
GSABaselineContractClauses.AIUsageRestrictions: No use of AI technologies that can compromise the integrity of the contract.
